headline: 12 contracts catalogued across Ethereum, OP Mainnet, Base, and PGN; 3 canonical L1StandardBridge deployments with associated L2 bridge infrastructure.

findings.text: Etherscan name-tag searches surfaced 3 primary L1StandardBridge contracts: OP Mainnet (0x99C9fc46f92E8a1c0deC1b1747d010903E884bE1), Base (0x3154Cf16ccdb4C6d922629664174b904d80F2C35), and PGN (0xd0204b9527c1ba7bd765fa5ccd9355d38338272b) on Ethereum mainnet.

Official docs at https://docs.optimism.io/chain/addresses lists L2 contract addresses for OP Mainnet with L2StandardBridge at 0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000010 and L2CrossDomainMessenger at 0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000007. Base docs at https://docs.base.org/base-chain/network-information/base-contracts lists identical L2 predeployed addresses for Base chain. PGN bridge addresses discovered via etherscan.io.
No audit links recorded in per-protocol context. Search for Optimism Bridge audits in provided audit_links field yielded null.
protocol.github field is empty (none recorded). GitHub source repositories for Optimism and Base bridges not pinned in this run; would require separate discovery.

Three chains represented (Ethereum, Base, PGN). Ethereum serves as L1 for all three bridge instances. Per-chain L1StandardBridge deployments on Ethereum recorded separately. OP Mainnet, Base, and PGN each have predeployed L2StandardBridge at canonical address 0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000010.

No factory enumeration performed; OptimismMintableERC20Factory contracts identified but child token enumeration deferred per cap rule (child tokens are user-bridged ERC-20s and too numerous for discovery slice).
Role taxonomy applied: L1StandardBridge and L2StandardBridge classified as 'bridge'; CrossDomainMessenger as 'router'; OptimismMintableERC20Factory as 'factory'.
All addresses in admin_addresses[] trace to fetched documentation or explorer pages cited in evidence[].

rationale.verdict: Walked official docs (https://docs.optimism.io/chain/addresses, https://docs.base.org/base-chain/network-information/base-contracts) and block explorer pages via search-grounded fetch. Catalogued 3 L1StandardBridge deployments (OP Mainnet, Base, PGN) + their L2 counterparts + supporting infrastructure. No GitHub or audit corpora pinned. Grade is 'unknown' because discovery is always 'unknown' by spec.

evidence.shows: L2 contract addresses for OP Mainnet including L2StandardBridge (0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000010), L2CrossDomainMessenger (0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000007), OptimismMintableERC20Factory (0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000012), and references to mainnet contract addresses page.

L2 contract addresses for Base Mainnet (L2StandardBridge at 0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000010, L2CrossDomainMessenger at 0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000007, OptimismMintableERC20Factory at 0xF10122D428B4bc8A9d050D06a2037259b4c4B83B); L1 contract addresses including L1StandardBridge at 0x3154Cf16ccdb4C6d922629664174b904d80F2C35 on Ethereum Mainnet.
Base Bridge contract on Ethereum identified via Etherscan with balance $971.8M across chains and 402K transactions, confirming deployed L1StandardBridge role.
PGN L1StandardBridge contract on Ethereum identified via search result and etherscan explorer page with L1ChugSplashProxy structure.
Confirms L1StandardBridge address for OP Mainnet at 0x99C9fc46f92E8a1c0deC1b1747d010903E884bE1 on Ethereum Mainnet and L2StandardBridge at 0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000010 on OP Mainnet.
L2StandardBridge is a predeploy contract at 0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000010 referenced in official Optimism specs.

unknowns: D3: Audit links not provided in per-protocol context; no audit PDF sources available to scan.
D4: GitHub repositories for Optimism/Base/PGN bridges not pinned; source code discovery deferred.
D5: PGN bridge details limited to L1 contract; L2 contract addresses assumed to follow OP Stack standard (0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000010) but not independently verified.
D6-offchain: OptimismMintableERC20Factory enumeration (child tokens) capped at 50 per factory; full child contract discovery deferred to evaluation slices.

protocol_metadata.about: The Optimism Bridge enables users to move ETH and ERC-20 tokens between Ethereum and OP Mainnet via a standard bridge mechanism using cross-domain messaging. The protocol has been extended to support multiple chains in the Superchain ecosystem, including Base and PGN (Public Goods Network), each deployed with separate L1StandardBridge contracts on Ethereum and corresponding L2 infrastructure. Deposits are processed automatically while withdrawals require a 7-day challenge period for fraud proof verification.
